# MDBList

Content source backed by [MDBList](https://mdblist.com). Each configured list is polled and
its contents requested in Riven, which makes it the easiest way to keep a collection
tracking something like "top rated sci-fi of the decade" without curating it by hand.

Lists are identified as `username/list-name`. An API key is free from your MDBList account
page.

<!-- BEGIN GENERATED -->
<!-- Generated by `cargo run --bin gen-docs`. Do not edit this block by hand. -->

**Category:** Services

### Events

Subscribes to:

- `riven.content-service.requested`

### Settings

Set via environment variables prefixed with `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__MDBLIST__`, or in the settings UI.

| Setting | Environment variable | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `apikey` | `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__MDBLIST__apikey` | secret | Yes | — | — |
| `lists` | `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__MDBLIST__lists` | text | No | — | Comma-separated MDBList list URLs, slugs, or IDs. |
<!-- END GENERATED -->
